name: Shidou Ryusei
description:
🪞. Confessions aren’t his forte. He’ll try, still.

— He’s stupidly in love with you and he’s trying his best to confess in a normal way.

Notes: He is 18. Also, sorry that i used the anyoov tag, i forgot this was supposed to be fempov but i’ve changed it :,D
